{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135048E88F7A4C9E65269A57DC"}"},"total":762},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394082421597717273","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"客观点评：文笔不错，情节张弛有度，整体节奏舒缓
主观点评：很多都是我小时候干过的事，看男主就像看小时候的我。看的时候很放松很开心，但有的时候会看着看着想到以前的事突然伤感起来。","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":12,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774245048269A57DC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227394082421597717273%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227250708148904791100%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721571266,"group_id":"7250708148904791100","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"全网寻找异父异母","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw1olOf4qqW5GlzSf0pCc36Rmp4a88PJIuHGO9HRhWoN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b31dcfee4ac34552bf44c330c69985be~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789132&x-signature=RcNOqwCqiRqJJJN3T4gAc%2BLPwdM%3D","user_id":"2808572183053296","user_name":"乌鲁鲁叫父"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2808572183053296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250708148904791100","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+星际+1v1+双洁】
地球爆发一种基因病，以当前的医疗水平还无法医治。一但发病，浑身的皮肤就会犹如融化一般，短短几秒就只剩下一具森森白骨。
不过这种病能被检查出来，迟安知道自己得了基因病后，选择进入冷冻仓，等待有医治方案后再被解冻。
从冷冻仓出来后，他以为自己就此可以过上无病无痛的快乐生活。
可结果却是身体缩回了孩童时期，还有很多外星人等着领养自己当宠物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o05402386cb3ce0224a5ed9579b7eb23a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"杉茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7250708148904791100","book_name":"被领养了，但我是作为宠物被养","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":77,"name":"星际","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=77&name=星际&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7250765189921505829","read_count":"18752","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"422749"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"204","tags":"双男主,现代,星际,双洁,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/49b43bcb07d7c9d38ce4963814c97968~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429048&x-signature=7G4cDzwy8779qPXDcyWugI5xtOw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"81923825923","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"55"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135048E88F7A4C9E65269A57DC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12151,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9272},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606598354690196248","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从初中连载开始追更，记得每次下晚自习，都要专门点开看看更新了没有，后面上高中没有再看了，偶然打开番茄居然发现节完结了，感觉时间过得真的很快，这本小说描写的感情特别细腻，尤其是关于家庭的亲情，刚开篇前两章就给我看哭了，男主的设定非常的萌，他们之间的感情慢慢地升温，写得特别好，题材也非常新颖，一点也不老套，而且挺甜的，文笔也不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771053007,"group_id":"7250708148904791100","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"hi","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxHNbIRPt9h8FU9NOGE4GiHW2qZvOK9L74MPq+prZ5rS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/832a8d90af2a4be0b9b38c0cd43574c8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793249&x-signature=Dv6iVJhdBoEHctEBCRbtQ2cPQD0%3D","user_id":"2397369537139316","user_name":"是阿珉啊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2397369537139316","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250708148904791100","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+星际+1v1+双洁】
